name: brain-lite-agent-harness
description: A native-first, verifier-gated agent harness with bounded recall, measurable policies, and optional behavioral memory.

scripts.build:cli: node --check index.js && node --check bin/brain-lite.js && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.check: node --check scripts/brain-lite-router.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-delegate.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-routing-ledger.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-subagent-ab.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-task-contract.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-context-economy.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-harness-tax.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-skill-lifecycle-v2.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-v8-eval.js && npm run check:entrypoint && npm run check:v8 && npm run check:behavioral-memory && node --check v7/scripts/evolution-gate.js && node v7/scripts/evolution-gate.js --self-test && npm test
scripts.check:v8: node --check scripts/brain-lite-policy-lab.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-outcome-attribution.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-index-health.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-trace-v2.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-v8-review.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-daily-review.js && npm run test:v8
scripts.check:entrypoint: node --check index.js && node --check bin/brain-lite.js && node --test tests/public-entrypoint.test.js
scripts.check:behavioral-memory: node --check scripts/brain-lite-behavioral-memory.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-behavioral-memory-cli.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-behavioral-policy.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-behavioral-context.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-behavioral-privacy-export.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-behavioral-trace.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-candidate-store.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-correction-detector.js && node --check scripts/brain-lite-host-event-normalizer.js
